narrative: A Search Engineer at Rephrase.ai with four years of experience, bringing solid product‑company exposure. Strong verified skill depth was the main factor boosting the ranking. The profile shows direct work with Milvus, TensorFlow, LlamaIndex and OpenSearch—core technologies for a search‑and‑retrieval role—and the product focus aligns with our preference for building end‑to‑end solutions. However, the candidate falls short of the 5‑9 year experience window, has a JD‑relevant skill score well below the pool average, and platform engagement is slightly negative, with minor credibility concerns flagged. These gaps keep the ranking toward the lower end of the shortlist.
